ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the site */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude of the site above sea level */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the site was installed */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_types" (
  "gas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas type */,
  "gas_name" TEXT /* Name of the gas */,
  "gas_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gas (e.g., O2, CH4, CO, CO2, H2O) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the gas concentration */,
  "gas_description" TEXT /* Description of the gas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gas_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the measurement */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time at which the measurement was taken */,
  "gas_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas being measured */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the gas */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the measurement is of good quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_gas_id FOREIGN KEY ("gas_id") REFERENCES gas_types ("gas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
column_names: Contact email for inquiries about the site
Altitude of the site above sea level

Symbol of the gas (e.g., O2, CH4, CO, CO2, H2O)
